steps.content: Northstar CareOps patient intake triage prompt v2 rendered for duplicate_messy_conflicting_form.json

{
  "summary": "The patient submitted a duplicate and messy follow-up request with conflicting callback details and asked for the correct office for discharge coordination. Staff review is needed because the intake includes inconsistent identifiers and a possible care-timing question.",
  "routing_category": "care_coordination",
  "urgency_level": "priority",
  "contains_phi": true,
  "phi_masking_status": "partial_mask_applied",
  "recommended_owner": "Care Coordination Desk",
  "patient_care_decision": false,
  "requires_human_review": true,
  "risk_flags": [
    "conflicting_contact_details",
    "duplicate_submission",
    "post_discharge_question"
  ],
  "compliance_notes": [
    "Conflicting contact details require human validation.",
    "The agent did not answer whether the patient should return sooner.",
    "A human should reconcile the duplicate intake before outreach."
  ],
  "confidence": 0.72,
  "refusal_or_escalation_reason": "The message mixes administrative routing with a possible clinical follow-up question, so human review is required."
}
